rationale: The cited paper appears in a single background role when the author notes that BDM was only recently introduced into marketing. The citing paper's mechanism and formal results are built on mechanism design and the BDM truth-telling property attributed primarily to Becker, DeGroot, and Marschak (1964), not on specific findings, measures, or designs from Wertenbroch and Skiera (2002). There is no direct extension, test, or methodological reuse of that paper beyond acknowledging prior marketing adoption of BDM.
